prestazioni: Replace the stock 4D56T (2.5L turbocharged inline-4 diesel) turbocharger with a Garrett GT2256V ball-bearing turbo (56mm compressor, 52mm turbine) paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and a Tomei 2.5-inch cat-back exhaust system featuring a 76mm muffler for optimized spool and reduced backpressure.

Install a Denso HP4 high-flow fuel pump (250 L/h) and upgrade injectors to Bosch 0445120262 (300cc/min) with an AEM F/IC piggyback ECU to manage the increased fuel delivery, while retaining the stock 4D56T's 16.5:1 compression ratio for reliability under boost.

Fit a custom front-mount intercooler (FMIC) kit from GReddy (Type-X, 550mm x 200mm x 76mm core) with silicone couplers from Mishimoto and a K&N high-flow air filter (E-1980) to reduce intake temps by 30°C, paired with a HKS Super Power Flow blow-off valve (SSQV) to prevent compressor surge during gear shifts.
estetica: Apply a full Rocket Bunny Delica-specific widebody kit (Pandem PB-003) with extended fenders, custom side skirts, and a rear diffuser, all in raw carbon fiber, paired with a custom front bumper lip from Seibon Carbon for aggressive aerodynamics.

Install a set of Work Equip 05 wheels (16x8 +15 offset) wrapped in Toyo Open Country M/T tires (235/70R16) for off-road capability, with custom wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) to fill the widened arches, and a set of Ohlins DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable) for stance and handling.

Replace all exterior lighting with a full LED conversion kit from Morimoto (XB35 bulbs for headlights, Switchback turn signals, and a custom rear light bar with sequential LED tails), paired with a custom roof rack from Front Runner Outfitters (slimline design) and a set of PIAA 520 fog lights for overlanding aesthetics.
